upasarga_meanings.meaning: cAro ora se nAcanA cakkara lagAte hue nAcanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'klIbA iva pranftyanto vane ye kurvate Gozam' (aTarva॰8.6.11) pranftyanto nartanapUrvakaM gacCantaH
'pranftyatIva saNgrAme cApahasto DanaYjayaH' (BA॰vi॰62.9) harzAvizwaH pranfttavAn (=nartitumArabDa) praSabda AdikarmaRi
'ye tadAsmAn pranftyanti punargOriti gOriti' (BA॰8.83.43) avahelayanto nartakavfttimAsTuH
'yadIme keSino janA gfhe te samanartizuH' (aTarva॰14.2.59) samaM nftyamakArzurityarTaH
'taM tamiti ninfttiH antastftIyamaharnIva vA antaM gatvA ninftyati' (SAM0 brA0 204) ninfttirAvfttiH ninftyati Avartate
'tadyaTA'ByAgAramaBininartaM punaH punaH pApmAnaM nirhaRyAdevamevEtErasurAn nirGnanti' (SAM0 brA0 178)
'ye'smAnpuropanftyanta mUQA gOriti goriti tAn vayaM pratinftyAmaH punargOriti gOriti' (BA0 Salya0 597)..
'ye SAlAH parinftyanti sAyaM gardaBanAdinaH' (aTarva0 8610) parinftyanti parito nftyanti upasargavaSAnnftiriha sakarmakaH
'ye smAnpuropanftyanta mUQA gO rgOriti' (BA0 Salya0 597) ukto'rTaH
'upagItopanfttaSca ganDarvApsarasAM gaROH' (BA0 u0 1234) pratyaye viSezo nArTe
'kzetraM hi rasavacCudDaM karmaREvopapAditam fte varzAnna kOnteya jAtu nirvartayet Palam' (BA0).. upapAditaM sampAditaM sADitaM kftam karmaRA karzaRena vApyAdijaladAnena ca
